ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Continued To Apr-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-08-2023 is admitted to probate. Caroline Keller Conway is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-24-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
